returns.isFresh: True if the price was updated within the heartbeat period

getAggregatedPrice(bytes32).notice: Get the aggregated (median) price from last 5 submissions

getPrice(bytes32).notice: Get the current price for an asset

isPriceFresh(bytes32).notice: Check if a price is fresh (within heartbeat)

submitPriceUpdate(bytes32,uint256,uint8).notice: Submit a price update as an oracle
